title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Toko, Momonosuke, Unknown person #7 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's the thing, O-lin. Udon's rather far.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Here's an approximate map of Wano Country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: (i) town haibi Harbor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Haku) - Mai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ONIGA- SHIMA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Head down- thin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I don

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're at Kuri, and we're heading over to Udon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The six villages are separated into regions by huge rivers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Their lands and climate all vary greatly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and of course, to reach upon, we'll have to cross a river, as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...it's very far, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't look at me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You are very diligent, Momo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must be! For I am at the center of this conflict!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I must be vigilant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Snaatch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Boing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: AHAHAH!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: ...?! Lord MOMONOSUKE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where did you learn that shout...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Snatch" is a shout from outside the country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I learned it from zerojuro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said that it was a magic word that would still the trembling heart when courage is lacking.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I forbid you from saying that anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?! but why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This may just be coincidence,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Kuri has a similar shout in the old dialect...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it most certainly is not a word that you should be using, Lord MOMONOSUKE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHAT?! BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No buts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wano- Ringo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Northern grave- yards

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My goodness, the town was in a total frenzy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That was so scary...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just cut down a beautiful lady! Who does that?! Samurai are so scary...

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Kyoshiro is a name unbetweenst to us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago, the boss of the Wano Yakuza was a sole man called "Hyogorougorou of the flowers!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's one fancy name...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if it was alright to send O-TOKO to the Red-light District... I'm a bit worried...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MM, yes, since she's incurred the wrath of the Shogun...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he wouldn't chase around a little child, would he?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about we go check on her, and take a trip to the baths while we're at it? I need some R&R!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll need to disguise ourselves. Both hot water and drinking water are under Orochi's management.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He controls all the basic daily life necessities in the flower capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think a break would be lovely. Let's go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm ashamed... I gained so little information during my mission...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I learned was the time Orochi will wake up on the day of battle,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The contents of the Trib- Lte that will be carried to Onigashima by the Shogun's procession,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The time the banquet will begin, Kaido's organizational chart of members listed by favor,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their army numbers as well as weaponry inven- Tory,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As all as Dchi's a my and APONRY-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You are INCREDI- BLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! By the way, O-Robi, there really was a poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But it wasn't a red stone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?! really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're always so fortunate with stones, Honeyekichi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately I wasn't able to copy it down this time around, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I was snoop- ing around in soul form, I found it behind a very strong door in the basement.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a room with many strange wooden dolls lined up everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hm? Kokeshi dolls?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the "road" poneglyph is probably at onigashi- Ma, like we suspected.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOHOHO! Anyway, for now let's go to the public bathhouse!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not you! You'll scare everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aww, NOOO!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 67 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
